PROFILE.name: Joshua Opria
PROFILE.title: Full-Stack & AI/ML Engineer
PROFILE.summary: Senior Software Engineer focused on AI/ML systems, distributed architectures, and open-source. arXiv author (STRUM) and maintainer of Octave.
anecdotes: I've always had a passion for video games and originally wanted to develop them, which led me to discover a love for technology in general.
My journey through school and past roles has taken me from game prototypes to building distributed AI systems and mentoring engineers.
I'm a lifelong gamer, a drummer, and a car enthusiast.

PROJECTS.title: STRUM
PROJECTS.description: Audio-to-Chart ML Pipeline: Converts raw audio into playable rhythm game charts using deep learning.

PROJECTS.title: OCTAVE
PROJECTS.description: Desktop Chart Editor & Auto-Charter: One-click audio to chart workflow, cross-platform app.

PROJECTS.title: YARG Online Multiplayer
PROJECTS.description: Networking layer for an open-source rhythm game. First online multiplayer for YARG.

PROJECTS.title: Turtle Recognition
PROJECTS.description: Computer Vision for the Toledo Zoo: Turtle identification system using CNNs.

PROJECTS.title: 2D Action Platformer
PROJECTS.description: Unreal Engine 5 prototype: Side-scrolling action platformer with custom movement and AI.

PROJECTS.title: Bot-Cleaner
PROJECTS.description: Discord moderation bot: Detects and removes spam/bot accounts from servers.

EXPERIENCES.description: Architecting LLM-powered document intelligence pipelines and distributed event-driven systems. Leading engineers and shaping the architectural direction of internal AI systems.
Led API architecture and team development across multiple data domains, partnering directly with business stakeholders.
Owned high-throughput API delivery and CI/CD pipeline design.
Built internal developer tooling for API governance.
Built developer-facing tooling and authentication infrastructure.
Built an AR mobile app integrating real-world data from government APIs.
First exposure to production cloud infrastructure.
